Description: Technically prevent the submission of PII/Secrets to chatbots/AI (block "Submit" or "Paste").
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Sinaptic.AI: Blocks action immediately when PII is detected.

Description: Automatically replace sensitive entities (Names, Emails) with placeholders before data leaves the browser.
Manual Implementation (Free): Manual "Find & Replace" in Word before pasting to ChatGPT.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Sinaptic.AI: Masking or tokenise sensitive data

Description: Block access to known malicious AI domains or "Jailbreak" prompt libraries at the network level.
Manual Implementation (Free): Configure local hosts file on each machine (impractical).
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Cloudflare Gateway / Cisco Umbrella: Auto-block category "Malicious AI".

Description: Trigger a security warning popup at the moment a user attempts a risky action.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Sinaptic.AI: warning highlites, tooltips and pop-ups when PII/PHI data detected

Description: Ability to instantly cut off access to a specific AI tool for the entire company if a vulnerability is found.
Manual Implementation (Free): Email to all staff: "Stop using Tool X immediately".
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Okta / Zscaler: One-click revocation of app access globally.

Description: A pre-approved playbook for handling data leaks via AI (Legal notification, PR steps).
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Jira / ServiceNow: Automated workflow triggered by "Critical" DLP alert.

Description: Automatically isolate a compromised device from the network if it exhibits malicious AI behavior.
Force immediate password reset if credentials were pasted into a public AI prompt.
Manual Implementation (Free): IT Admin emails user to change password manually.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Okta / Azure AD: Auto-expire password via API hook.

Description: Process to notify authorities (DPA) within 72 hours of a confirmed AI data breach.
Manual Implementation (Free): Manual email drafting by Legal team.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): OneTrust / Vanta: Incident breach wizard generates legal form.
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): GDPR Art. 33; EU AI Act Art. 62

Description: Procedure to handle user requests asking "Why did the AI make this decision?".
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): GDPR (Right to Explanation); EU AI Act Art. 86

Description: Preserve AI logs and prompt history if litigation (lawsuit) is anticipated.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Google Vault / Relativity: Immutable retention of logs.

Description: Annual review of AI vendors' security posture (SOC2, ISO certs).
Manual Implementation (Free): Email vendor asking for new certificates.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Vanta / Drata: Auto-fetch vendor security reports.

Description: Regularly update "AI Acceptable Use Policy" based on new tools (e.g., when GPT-5 comes out).
Manual Implementation (Free): Word doc editing + re-signing by everyone.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Vanta: "Policy Versioning" and automated re-acceptance request.

Description: Mandate human review for high-impact AI decisions (Hiring, Credit approval).
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Jira / Asana: Workflow step "Awaiting Human Approval".
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): EU AI Act Art. 14; ISO 42001 A.6.3

Description: Ensure paid AI subscriptions include legal protection against copyright lawsuits.
Manual Implementation (Free): Legal review of contracts (e.g. Microsoft Copilot Copyright Commitment).
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Procurement Software: Flag contracts without indemnification clauses.
Mapping (ISO / GDPR / AI Act / NIST): EU AI Act Art. 50; Legal Risk

Description: Mechanism for employees to safely report unsafe/unethical AI practices internally.
Manual Implementation (Free): Anonymous Google Form or physical box.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Whispli / Vault Platform: Anonymous reporting tool.

Description: Obtain explicit consent from customers before using their data to train AI models.
Assessment of energy consumption for large internal AI training jobs.
Automated Implementation (Recommended): Sinaptic.AI Dashboard for AI compute energy, carbon trail and water usage
